<!-- Generated by GitHub Copilot -->
# agentic-research-assistant

Starter multi-agent research assistant with LangGraph orchestration and SSE trace streaming.

## Implemented starter components

- Searcher, Summarizer, Critic agent modules
- LangGraph StateGraph orchestration in agents/graph.py
- FastAPI endpoint GET /research streaming trace and final answer via SSE
- React chat-style UI with collapsible trace cards
- Tavily search integration and PDF reader utility
- Prompt templates in prompts/

## Run backend

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
uvicorn api.main:app --reload --port 8002
```

## Run frontend

```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm run dev
```
